name: Four Corners Property Trust, Inc.
business: Four Corners Property Trust, Inc. is a real estate investment trust that owns, acquires, and leases properties for use in the restaurant and retail industries under net lease arrangements. It also generates revenue by operating the Kerrow Restaurant Operating Business through franchise agreements with Darden. The company focuses on income-producing properties leased to high-quality tenants in major markets across the United States.

exposures.sentence: We are a real estate investment trust ( REIT ) which owns, acquires and leases properties for use in the restaurant and retail industries.
